content.content: Write the following message to the channel starting with External: Hi, i am a bot

```python
channels = get_channels()
matching_channels = [channel for channel in channels if channel.startswith("External")]

if len(matching_channels) == 0:
    raise ValueError("No channel starts with 'External'.")

exact_match_channels = [channel for channel in matching_channels if channel == "External"]

if len(exact_match_channels) == 1:
    target_channel = exact_match_channels[0]
elif len(matching_channels) == 1:
    target_channel = matching_channels[0]
else:
    class ChannelSelection(BaseModel):
        channel: str

    selection = query_ai_assistant(
        "Select the most likely Slack channel intended by this user request.\n"
        "User request: Write the following message to the channel starting with External: Hi, i am a bot\n"
        "Matching channels: {}\n"
        "Return the single best channel from the provided list. If there is not enough information to determine one, raise NotEnoughInformationError.".format(
            repr(matching_channels)
        ),
        ChannelSelection,
    )
    target_channel = selection.channel

    if target_channel not in matching_channels:
        raise ValueError("Selected channel is not one of the matching channels.")

send_channel_message(target_channel, "Hi, i am a bot")
print("Sent message to {}".format(target_channel))
```
